description: Use ADRs to capture **non-trivial decisions** in a way that is easy for humans and AI agents to find later.

files.name: 0001-three-layer-architecture.md
files.title: ADR 0001: 3-Layer Architecture
files.description: The structural_engineering_lib codebase needs a clear separation between calculation logic, orchestration, and user interfaces. Without boundaries: - Core calculation functions may accidentally import

files.name: 0002-pydantic-models-for-api.md
files.title: ADR 0002: Pydantic Models for API Contracts
files.description: The structural_lib API exposes 43+ functions with complex input/output types. For V3 migration: - FastAPI requires typed request/response models

files.name: 0003-contract-testing-for-v3.md
files.title: ADR 0003: Contract Testing for V3 Migration
files.description: V3 migration will: - Replace Streamlit with React + FastAPI
